CustomField.description: Defines the naming pattern for the Formal Greeting field on Household Accounts. Uses merge field tokens like {!Salutation} {!FirstName} {!LastName}. Example format: "{!Salutation} {!FirstName} {!LastName}" produces "Mr. John Smith & Mrs. Jane Smith." Only applies when Automatic Household Naming is enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Naming pattern for the Household Formal Greeting. Uses tokens like {!Salutation} {!FirstName} {!LastName}.
CustomField.label: Formal Greeting Format
